title: Soft cheese and unpasteurized dairy in pregnancy
excerpt: Listeria risk, what to avoid, safe alternatives, and tips for Vietnamese cheeses and yogurt drinks.
content:
## Risk

Unpasteurized milk and soft cheeses can carry **Listeria**, which is especially dangerous in pregnancy.

## Avoid

- Raw milk, artisan soft cheeses unless labeled pasteurized and cooked.
- Soft ripened cheeses with rind (brie-style) unless heated until steaming.

## Safer choices

- Pasteurized milk, yogurt, hard cheeses.
- Cook dishes containing cheese until bubbling hot.

## Tips in Vietnam

Buy dairy with clear pasteurization labels; prefer reputable brands for yogurt drinks (sữa chua). When unsure, choose well-cooked dishes.
